overview.description: The ProShares UltraShort FTSE Europe (EPV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FTSE Developed Europe All Cap index. The fund provides a daily leveraged inverse (-2x) exposure to a market-cap-weighted index of European developed markets equities. EPV was launched on Jun 16, 2009 and is issued by ProShares.
